title: The Energy Storage Game Is Afoot: Form Energy Faces Off Against Tesla Megapack 3
description:
The US energy storage startup Form Energy is challenging Tesla's new Megapack 3 rollout with a new 100-hour iron-air battery, with deployments in Minnesota and six other states in the planning stages.

The post The Energy Storage Game Is Afoot: Form Energy Faces Off Against Tesla Megapack 3 appeared first on CleanTechnica.
